description: After a project is closed, a project manager sends a Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) survey to the main project sponsor.

nodes.task_description: Identify the primary contact/sponsor for the recently closed project.

expected_outcome.value: Project manager finds the correct contact person.

nodes.task_description: Send the standard post-project CSAT survey.

expected_outcome.value: The survey is successfully sent to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Review the submitted feedback and share it with the project team.

expected_outcome.value: The team receives feedback on their performance.
